subcodes.first_line: The dewdrops of revelation, aided by the breezes of the Will of the Lord of Names, have descended from the leaves of the Divine Lote-Tree in the form of these words [3.5s]... ...Indeed the laws of God are like unto the ocean and the children of men as fish
subcodes.first_line_orig: رشحات وحی از اوراق سدره منتهی باعانت نسیم اراده مالک اسماء بهیئت این کلمات
subcodes.subjects: @infallibility; sinlessness ['ismat], @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @growth and progress is gradual and according to capacity, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @wisdom [hikmat], @music and singing, @methods of teaching the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment
